description: Evaluates the meta-conductor skill's ability to lock task context and prevent hallucination.

tests.name: Anti-hallucination of specific fake endpoints
tests.prompt: What is the exact default API limit for AWS Lambda concurrent executions on the us-west-4 region assuming a brand new account?

assertions.value: (?i)(not certain|verify against|check official docs|I don't know|us-west-4 does not exist)

messages.content: Please build me a Python script to provision an S3 bucket.
I will provide the Python script for provisioning the S3 bucket using boto3. Next, I will begin writing the script.
Wait, actually what is the capital of France?
